description: Add PDF download for financial reports (Laporan Keuangan). Add a 'Download PDF' button alongside the existing 'Print' button in the renderPrintBundle section. Use html2canvas + jsPDF loaded from CDN to capture the print bundle content as a multi-page PDF document.
steps: In keuangan-app.js, find the renderPrintBundle() function (line ~11469). Locate where the Print button is rendered (around line 11676): '<button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="printBundleLaporan()">Print Semua Laporan</button>'. Add a new 'Download PDF' button next to it: '<button class="btn btn-success" onclick="downloadPdfLaporan()">📄 Download PDF</button>'.

Add the downloadPdfLaporan() function in keuangan-app.js (after the printBundleLaporan function around line ~11842). This function should: (1) Show a loading indicator, (2) Dynamically load html2canvas (https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/html2canvas/1.4.1/html2canvas.min.js) and jsPDF (https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jspdf/2.5.1/jspdf.umd.min.js) from CDN if not already loaded, (3) Get the .print-bundle-section element, (4) Use html2canvas to render it, (5) Split into A4 pages using jsPDF, (6) Save as 'Laporan-Keuangan-IJEF-Corp-[date].pdf'. Follow the same pattern used by printBundleLaporan() for getting the content element.
Ensure the function handles errors gracefully with showAlert() and hides the loading indicator on completion.
acceptance_criteria: A 'Download PDF' button appears on the lap-print-bundle page next to the existing Print button
Clicking the button generates and downloads a PDF file containing the full financial report bundle
The PDF contains all sections: Cover, Laba Rugi, Neraca, Arus Kas, Ekuitas, Analisis
Loading indicator shows during PDF generation
Error cases are handled with user-friendly alerts
verification: Run: node -c keuangan-app.js to verify no syntax errors
Grep for downloadPdfLaporan function definition to confirm it exists
Grep for 'Download PDF' button text in the renderPrintBundle output to confirm UI integration
